# JaiDeeClear — Premium Window Tinting Across Thailand

> JaiDeeClear is Thailand's leading professional window tinting service, providing premium window film installation for homes, condos, villas, offices, and commercial properties. We block up to 99% UV radiation, significantly reduce heat and electricity costs, and enhance privacy — all with expert mobile installation that comes directly to your property.

## About JaiDeeClear

JaiDeeClear is a professional window film installer operating across three core service areas in Thailand — Bangkok, Phuket (home base), and Chonburi (Pattaya & the Eastern Seaboard). We specialize in residential and commercial window tinting, offering solar control film, UV protection film, privacy film, and decorative film. All installations are carried out by certified technicians with a satisfaction guarantee.

- **Phone/WhatsApp:** +66 65 507 9694
- **Email:** jaideeclear@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://jaideeclear.com
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/Jaideeclear
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/jaideeclear
- **Service model:** Mobile installation — we come to you

## Services

### Window Film Types
- **Solar Control / Heat Rejection Film** — Blocks infrared heat to keep interiors cool and reduce air-conditioning costs
- **UV Protection Film** — Blocks up to 99% of harmful UV rays, protecting skin, furniture, flooring, and artwork from fading
- **Privacy Film / One-Way Mirror Film** — Provides daytime privacy without blocking natural light
- **Safety & Security Film** — Holds shattered glass together in case of breakage
- **Decorative Film** — Frosted, patterned, and custom designs for offices and homes
- **Clear UV Film** — Invisible protection that preserves views while blocking UV radiation

### Property Types Served
- Private homes and houses
- Condominiums and apartments
- Luxury villas and resort properties
- Schools and educational institutions
- Office buildings and commercial premises
- Retail shops and showrooms
- Hotels and hospitality properties

### Key Benefits
- Up to 99% UV ray blocking
- Significant heat and glare reduction
- Lower electricity bills from reduced AC usage
- Enhanced privacy and security
- Protection of furniture, floors, and interiors from fading
- Professional mobile installation — no need to travel
- Satisfaction guarantee on all installations

## Service Areas

JaiDeeClear operates across Thailand's major cities and tourist destinations:

### Bangkok (กรุงเทพมหานคร)
Window tinting services for Bangkok condos, houses, townhouses, and offices. Serving all Bangkok districts including Sukhumvit, Silom, Sathorn, Thonglor, Ekkamai, Lat Phrao, Bang Na, Prawet, and surrounding areas.
- Page: https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-bangkok

### Phuket (ภูเก็ต) — home base
Window film installation for Phuket villas, condos, hotels, and homes. Covering Patong, Rawai, Kata, Karon, Kamala, Laguna, Bang Tao, Cherng Talay, and the entire island.
- Page: https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-phuket

### Chonburi (ชลบุรี) — Pattaya & the Eastern Seaboard
Window tinting across Chonburi and the Eastern Seaboard — Pattaya, Jomtien, Naklua, Sri Racha, Bang Saray, and Ban Chang. Beachfront condos, retirement homes, high-rises, and commercial/industrial premises.
- Page: https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-chonburi

## Property-Type Pages

Window film tailored to each kind of property, fitted on-site across Thailand. Installed pricing from ฿70/sq ft (carbon) to ฿180/sq ft (premium sputtering).

- [Properties We Serve](https://jaideeclear.com/properties) — Hub for every property type
- [Villa Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-villas) — Floor-to-ceiling glass, sea & pool views, west sun. Real installs at Sava Beach Villas, Anchan Flora
- [Condo Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-condos) — High-rise balcony & city-view glass, daytime privacy, juristic-approved film. The Cube Amaze
- [House Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-houses) — Family homes & townhouses: lower A/C bills, protect furnishings, daytime privacy
- [Office Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-offices) — Glare-free screens & meeting rooms, cooler workspaces. Real law-firm install
- [Hotel & Resort Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-hotels) — Guest comfort at scale, protected interiors. Veranda, The Nai Harn, Lotus Bleu
- [Restaurant & Café Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-restaurants) — Keep diners cool, cut frontage glare. CRÈME Café, Punjabi Resto-Bar
- [Shophouse Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-shophouses) — Street-level frontage heat block, protect stock, daytime privacy, safety film
- [School Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-schools) — Glare-free classrooms, safety film, 99% UV. Trang Ruampattana School
- [Padel Court Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-padel-courts) — Glare control & anti-shatter film for glass-walled courts. Ware Haus Padel

- [Our Work](https://jaideeclear.com/our-work) — Project portfolio: 36 completed window film installations across Phuket, including luxury villas (Layan Estate, Anchan, Sava, Cohiba, Apella), hotels & resorts (Angsana, Veranda, The Nai Harn, Diva Patong), condos (Laguna Park 2, Supalai Primo), and restaurants/venues
- [Restaurant & Café Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-restaurants) — Heat, glare & UV film for cafés and restaurants: keep diners cool by the glass, cut frontage glare, protect interiors and menus from fade. Real installs at CRÈME Brunch & Café and Punjabi Resto-Bar
- [Shophouse Window Tinting](https://jaideeclear.com/window-tinting-shophouses) — Heat, glare & safety film for street-level shophouses: beat fierce frontage heat, protect stock and displays from fade, daytime privacy at street level, and safety film that holds glass against break-ins and storms
- [Careers](https://jaideeclear.com/careers) — Open roles at JaiDeeClear. Currently hiring a bilingual Thai/English Sales Executive in Bangkok or Phuket (full-time, base + commission)
- [Affiliates](https://jaideeclear.com/affiliates) — Affiliate / referral program. Earn 10% commission on every closed window film deal you refer. Free to join, open to industry partners, creators, and anyone with a network. Apply via the signup form on the page.
- [Blog](https://jaideeclear.com/blog/) — Window film guides, tips, and city-specific advice
